recentTweets.text:
The president will do anything that he can to subvert the election. 

It's our job to make sure that doesn't happen. https://t.co/nS9ZIMfi8W

Celebrating 50 years of innovation at @UofR's Laboratory for Laser Energetics! For five decades, LLE has made Rochester a global leader in laser science, fusion research, and cutting-edge discovery.

Proud to support the world-class research happening right here in our community. https://t.co/5oPHS4uNSm

Today, we remember Congressman John Lewis, six years after his passing.
 
The best way to honor his legacy is to continue the work he began: protecting our democracy and ensuring every eligible American has access to the ballot box.
 
His legacy continues to guide us. https://t.co/zIhja5euHi

The SAVE Act is about taking over elections to try to stay in power. It would make it harder for eligible Americans to register to vote, especially women and those in rural communities. It's voter suppression—plain and simple. https://t.co/OLIt6EHdMw

Mail-in voting has been a safe and secure part of our elections since the Civil War. In 2024, 45 million Americans voted by mail. 

Even President Trump has voted by mail. The Trump agenda is unpopular and he wants to make it harder for Americans to vote.

Tonight’s address is part of Donald Trump’s ongoing campaign to subvert our democracy. 

The Trump Administration already declared that the 2020 election was secure.
The 2020 election was thoroughly protected, and his own administration determined it was secure. You can read the document here: https://t.co/3Yhqg88jxz

Join me live on @cspan tonight as we respond to President Trump's address.

Tune in!

As top Democrat on @HouseAdm_Dems, I'm working with voting groups across the country to prepare for Donald Trump's attacks on our elections.

The scenarios we are working through have never been encountered in American life before, but that hasn't stopped Donald Trump. https://t.co/drWs7p3dHF

Cruelty, inhumanity, and tragedy at the hands of ICE.

What happened to the America that welcomed people from around the world and was made stronger by them?

That's the America we should be fighting for. https://t.co/NbSHkXml0k

Our community is mourning Lt. John "JJ" Joseph, whose courage, compassion, and commitment to serving others left a lasting impact on so many.

I am keeping his loved ones and the entire RFD family in my thoughts as we honor his life, service, and legacy.
https://t.co/yxDT6VGcED

Americans deserve leaders who are accountable to the truth, not Donald Trump's ego.

If you cannot admit the simple fact that he lost the 2020 election, you have no business leading our nation's intelligence community. It's indulging a lie that fueled an attack on our democracy.

Great to be with Donald Sherman from @CREWcrew at our latest Anti-Corruption and Democracy Reform Task Force meeting.

We discussed how we can strengthen congressional oversight to better protect American citizens, root out corruption, and hold the executive branch accountable. https://t.co/YyZ0q30FpY

I was proud to recognize Dr. Beth Paul on the House floor as she concludes her tenure leading @Nazuniversity.
 
Her leadership guided the university through historic challenges and milestones, leaving a lasting legacy for students and our entire community. https://t.co/kqP24EnnSL

American families are knee-deep in a cost of living crisis. They can't afford another double-digit jump in health insurance premiums. 

We must be focused on lowering costs & protecting access to care, not dumping taxpayer dollars into an unauthorized war.
https://t.co/F3VKcvcrgd

Congratulations to the Penfield Little League team on their third-straight District 4 championship!

I am always impressed by the hard work, teamwork, and determination of our talented local young athletes.

https://t.co/3FiswofXhf
RT @CountyExecBello: An air quality health advisory has been issued in Monroe County beginning today, Wednesday, July 15th. Residents are e…

Today, @NSF announced a $15 million award to launch the NSF STELLAR Engine, led by @UofR.
 
This investment will help create good-paying jobs, grow our local economy, and give more students and workers the opportunity to build careers right here in our community. https://t.co/cM5ldFnvuW

I was proud to help secure funding for the NSF Engines program that made investments like this possible, and I congratulate @UofR, @NSF, @GovKathyHochul, and all our partners for coming together to cement Rochester's place as a global leader in laser technology.

The Trump Administration is arming the federal government against the right to vote.
 
They want to pick the voters so they get the result they want. We won't let that happen. https://t.co/vzQqVnKvUG

This represents another escalation in Donald Trump’s unauthorized war, and working families will pay the price through higher gas prices, more economic uncertainty, and greater risk for the men and women serving our country.

And none of this has reduced the nuclear threat from
As top Democrat on @HouseAdm_Dems, I'm working to empower voters and ensure the electoral system isn't hijacked by billionaires. https://t.co/mjHMTQG69G

.@UofR alum Beth Greenwood made history as the first American woman to catch in an NCAA baseball game. Now she's competing in the inaugural @wpbl_official season.

Rochester is proud to see one of our own continue breaking barriers on and off the field.
https://t.co/oppujETmDX

Over the next several months, we will continue to see wave after wave of things Donald Trump will try to do to stop Americans from voting.

We won't let him succeed. https://t.co/JjswnBHNBC

Donald Trump cannot accept that he lost the 2020 election and that is what this is really all about. 

Americans are getting tired of this, and they're remembering why they threw him out of the White House in 2020. https://t.co/GX8CJWvxcU

We just celebrated the 250th anniversary of self-government, this amazing idea that has guided us for two and a half centuries.

It's on the precipice of falling apart because of a president who has no respect for democracy. https://t.co/so4h1bTajf
Stay up to date with the important work I'm doing in Congress by signing up for my weekly newsletter here: https://t.co/JxIFrvYOXI

Scammers may ask for your Social Security number, bank account information, or other sensitive personal details.

Don't call the number on the postcard or share your information.

If you have questions about your VA benefits, contact the VA directly or reach out to my office.

⚠️Veterans and military families: Be on the lookout for a new scam.

Fraudulent postcards are claiming recipients qualify for extra VA benefits through a fake "Veterans Savings Program." The program does not exist, and these mailings are not from the VA. https://t.co/Bl43rlJMnq
Read more: https://t.co/bIbpzODVx8

Trump continues to double down on his efforts to erode trust in our elections, undermine independent oversight, and further his Administration’s attempt to ‘take over’ elections. Americans deserve elections that are safe, secure, and run free from political interference—not
Here we go again. President Trump is trying to dismantle yet another independent guardrail of our democracy designed to keep elections fair and secure.
As top Democrat on @HouseAdm_Dems, I'm leading the fight to push back against any threats to safe and secure elections. https://t.co/CMb8NaiGCf

158 years ago, the 14th Amendment made a promise: every person deserves equal protection under the law.

That promise has expanded freedom, advanced civil rights, and strengthened our democracy.

Defending our Constitution means defending the rights it guarantees—for everyone. https://t.co/qnu85ImlTY

The Voting Rights Act has broad, bipartisan support over decades, but the Supreme Court chose to demolish a critical pillar of this legislation.

We must fight back to protect the fundamental right to vote. https://t.co/vPuikVVkgK

Hillary Olson's leadership, vision, and dedication have strengthened @rocRMSC and inspired countless families and students.

Thank you, Hillary, for all you've done for Rochester, and best wishes in your next chapter. https://t.co/eB8MGTHdeq

President Trump and his allies want to take over our elections. 

He will continue trying to block access to the ballot, but we won't let him silence American voices. https://t.co/EsCWUBn3BN

Great conversation today with members of @RochesterChambr about the policies shaping Rochester's future.

From supporting small businesses and strengthening our workforce to investing in infrastructure and innovation, we can build an economy that creates opportunity for everyone. https://t.co/pbqIRiL0cy

Every day, my team helps our community navigate federal agencies, access important resources, and secure money owed to them—and I'm proud to say we've returned more than $1.3 million so far this year.

To learn how we may be able to assist you, visit: https://t.co/L39l2bsbrT

It was great to meet with our summer district interns today and discuss how engaging in public service is vital for the future of our democracy. 

Their work makes a difference in our office every day. I know these talented interns will go on to do extraordinary things! https://t.co/WrvXMxfdlf
It's true, Donald Trump would rather see families on the streets than at the ballot box because he fears the judgment of the American people. https://t.co/toLjnxZM5G

Safe, clean drinking water is a basic necessity. 

I joined my House colleagues in urging the EPA to protect—not weaken—our nation's PFAS drinking water standards. 

I'll keep fighting to protect public health and ensure every community has access to safe drinking water. https://t.co/9qrTgvGIL8

I’ll be live on MSNow in just a few minutes.

Tune in!

As we celebrate Independence Day, we honor those whose courage and sacrifice built a stronger nation and reaffirm our commitment to moving America forward in pursuit of a more perfect union.
 
Wishing everyone a safe and happy Fourth of July.

This Fourth of July holds special significance as our nation celebrates the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence.
 
For 250 years, Americans have carried forward the ideals of liberty, democracy, and self-government that define our country. https://t.co/smqiUZQQoT

We're about four months from Election Day. It's time to check your registration, make your voting plan, and know where to go for reliable information.

Your vote is your voice, and your voice is your power. https://t.co/bJu1RWWuPk

Congratulations to Dorie Winner as she turns 100! Her century of resilience and kindness is an inspiration to our community.

Wishing Dorie continued good health, happiness, and many more joyful moments surrounded by the people who love her.
https://t.co/2BBio3pVbg

Today marks the 62nd anniversary of the Civil Rights Act, a monumental law enacted to ensure this nation lived up to its founding principles. 

We still have much to do, and I remain committed to ensuring every eligible voter has equitable access to the ballot box.

Two years ago, SCOTUS' disastrous Trump v. United States decision gave presidents absolute immunity from criminal prosecution.  

I introduced a constitutional amendment to ensure presidents are held accountable under the law. I won't stop fighting to root out the corruption that

Anyone who knows me knows I'm a lifelong Cardinals fan—so getting to join the @MeetMeAtMusial podcast was a lot of fun.

Thanks to the team for having me on! Give it a listen:
https://t.co/0rkzc6JLvl

If you're born in the United States, you are a U.S. citizen. 

That's the end of it. https://t.co/5KqRwgNHsG

Every American has the right to free speech without fearing intimidation or retaliation. Reports of federal agents tracking down and intimidating a member of our Rochester community after they criticized ICE are deeply disturbing. This cannot continue.

We will be looking into

These aren't just numbers—they're families now facing higher costs, coverage gaps, and uncertainty because Republicans chose to slash healthcare to pay for tax breaks for billionaires.

New Yorkers deserve affordable, reliable healthcare. I'll keep fighting to protect it.

Today, health coverage ends for thousands of New Yorkers impacted by Trump Administration cuts to federal healthcare funding.

One year after Republicans passed their Big Ugly Bill, millions of Americans have already lost coverage, and premiums have surged for many on the ACA. https://t.co/A9EOC1qB0O

The Supreme Court reaffirmed a simple constitutional truth, one that should obvious to anyone who has read the text of the 14th amendment: if you're born in the United States, you're an American citizen.

No president can rewrite the Constitution with the stroke of a pen. I'll
Read more: https://t.co/61eAIQDO1L

Omar Ramos-Jimenez has called Rochester home for 30 years. He's worked, paid taxes, raised a family, and built a life in our community. His message to me was simple: "I just want to go home."
 
Today, I shared Omar's story on the House floor because dignity, due process, and https://t.co/NTGZlgmZlO

The Medicaid Fraud Control Unit protects access to healthcare and holds bad actors accountable, but the Trump Administration wants to undermine their anti-fraud work.

This doesn't protect taxpayers, it protects fraudsters and I'm with @NewYorkStateAG in fighting back.

Last night, I voted YES on the KIDS Act. For years, social media companies have known their platforms harm children and chosen engagement and profit over their safety. This bill is the first step towards holding those companies accountable.
 
This bill delivers real safeguards
Stay up to date with the important work I'm doing in Congress by signing up for my weekly newsletter: https://t.co/JxIFrvYOXI

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

https://t.co/jW1sJhHEHg

After a record-setting playoff run last year, it's great to see the world recognize Ernie's continued success.

Can't wait to watch you take the field in

President Trump's eagerness for reckless, endless war is no justification for abandoning hardworking Americans who need support.
 
We must prioritize bringing down costs for American families. https://t.co/G7PqQnRqrQ

House Republicans want to cut investments that help families afford basic necessities while pouring billions into defense spending.
 
That's not protecting Americans, it's draining them. https://t.co/qQpZSLKNse

109 years young!

Join me in wishing a very happy birthday to Ida Agnello of Webster, believed to be Monroe County's oldest resident. Her remarkable life is a testament to the power of family, community, and perseverance.
https://t.co/lMlOF5wRjj

But one week before our nation celebrates its 250th birthday, we are reminded of a timeless truth: America endures because no president, no party, and no politician is above the Constitution. The power belongs to the American people.

Today’s ruling is a victory for every American who believes our democracy belongs to the people and I’m grateful to the state attorneys general for their leadership.

President Trump’s illegal executive order sought to silence voters and cling to power.

I think often about the members of @RocMaidan, who have spent years organizing fundraisers, collecting supplies, and assembling medical kits for people they'll never meet.
 
Their commitment reminds us this war has real consequences. We must continue standing with Ukraine. https://t.co/DdSZ5Oao0I

13 years ago, the Supreme Court gutted a core protection of the Voting Rights Act in the Shelby County v. Holder decision.

This out-of-control and out-of-touch Supreme Court has only continued making it harder for Black voters and communities of color to make their voices heard.

We are strongest when every eligible American can make their voice heard.
 
Join @HouseAdm_Dems and @RepJeffries for a hearing on defending the right to vote in the wake of the disastrous Callais decision: https://t.co/lpRDNwj9XG

Too often, stolen and trafficked guns end up in the hands of dangerous criminals, fueling violence and putting families and law enforcement at risk.

Today, @SenBrianSchatz and I introduced our commonsense legislation to crack down on rogue gun dealers and stop gun trafficking.
Read more: https://t.co/PDV2wG6JXt

As AI continues to reshape our world, Congress must be prepared to harness its benefits while safeguarding transparency, accountability, and public trust.

Join @HouseAdm_Dems as we examine how AI could support congressional research and policy analysis in the years ahead:

The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act continues to deliver for Rochester.

The EPA is awarding $1M to #ROC projects to clean up contaminated properties, protect public health, and transform neglected sites into opportunities for housing, jobs, and community development.

When we passed this bipartisan legislation in 2021, we created federal investments that are helping communities like ours build a cleaner, stronger future.

I'll keep fighting to bring these resources home to Monroe County.

We can support a strong national defense without turning our backs on Americans struggling with rising costs.

House Republicans want to cut nearly $13 billion from programs that help working families afford the essentials.

Watch as @AppropsDems fight back:

Four years after Dobbs, my granddaughters have fewer rights than my mother did.

That's the reality of a SCOTUS decision that opened the door to interference in personal healthcare decisions.

I'm fighting to protect the right to make decisions about your body and your future.

Donald Trump would rather see Americans on the street than at the ballot box.

He is holding affordable housing hostage in a desperate attempt to silence millions of Americans. https://t.co/eUY8rChQj5

Trust is easy to lose and difficult to rebuild.
 
Trump's actions have undermined America's credibility and made the challenges ahead even greater. https://t.co/sjERkIBuuk

To learn how we may be able to assist you, visit: https://t.co/L39l2bsbrT
